spec: shows just a number starting at 0, and a button labeled "+" that adds 1 to it
shows just a number starting at 10, and a button labeled "-" that subtracts 1
shows just a number starting at 0, and a button labeled "+5" that adds 5
shows just a number starting at 3, a button labeled "up" that adds 1, and a button labeled "down" that subtracts 1
shows just a number starting at 0, a button labeled "+" that adds 1, and a button labeled "reset" that sets it back to 0
shows just a number starting at 1, and a button labeled "double" that doubles it
has a button labeled "toggle" that shows or hides the text "hello" (hidden at first)
has a button labeled "reveal" that makes the text "secret" appear (hidden at first)
has a text input and greets with "Hello, <typed text>!"
has a text input and a label showing exactly what was typed
has a text input and shows "You said: <typed text>"
shows just a total starting at 0, a button labeled "add 2" that adds 2, and a button labeled "add 3" that adds 3
shows "Total: $<n>" starting at 0, and a button labeled "+10" that adds 10
shows just a number starting at 0, a button labeled "+1" that adds 1, and the text "even" or "odd" for the number's parity
shows just a number starting at 0, and a button labeled "+" that adds 1 but never lets it pass 3
shows just a number starting at 1, and a button labeled "-" that subtracts 1 but never goes below 0
shows two numbers as just numbers, both starting at 0: a button labeled "a+" adds 1 to the first, a button labeled "b+" adds 1 to the second
has a button labeled "mode" that cycles the shown text through "red", "green", "blue" and back to "red" (starts at "red")
shows "Score: <n>" starting at 0, and a button labeled "goal" that adds 1
shows just a number starting at 5, a button labeled "tick" that subtracts 1 but stops at 0, and the text "done" once it reaches 0
has buttons labeled "on" and "off"; the text "LIGHT ON" is shown only after "on" and until "off"
shows just a number starting at 50, a button labeled "+10" that adds 10, and a button labeled "-10" that subtracts 10
shows just a number starting at 2, and a button labeled "triple" that multiplies it by 3
has a button labeled "left+" and a button labeled "right+", each adding 1 to its own hidden count, and shows just the SUM of the two counts (starting 0)
has a text input; shows "Hello, stranger" until something is typed, then "Hello, <typed text>"
shows just a number starting at 0, a button labeled "+3" that adds 3, and the text "big" once the number is 10 or more
has buttons labeled "yes" and "no", showing "Yes: <n>" and "No: <m>" tallies starting at 0
shows just a number starting at 0, a button labeled "+" that adds 1, and the text "limit reached" once the number is 5 or more
shows just a number starting at 0, and a button labeled "next even" that adds 2
has a text input; shows the text "empty" until something is typed
shows just a number starting at 1, and a button labeled "toggle" that hides or shows the number
shows just a number starting at 1, a button labeled "double" that doubles it, and the text "too big" once the number is above 8
shows just a number starting at 100, and a button labeled "spend 25" that subtracts 25
has a hidden count starting at 0 and a button labeled "+1" that adds 1; shows just the count modulo 3
shows the text "Welcome" and has a button labeled "start"; after clicking it, "Welcome" is replaced by "Let's go"
shows just a score starting at 0, a button labeled "correct" that adds 1, and a button labeled "wrong" that subtracts 1 but never below 0
shows "<n>s" starting at "0s", and a button labeled "tick" that adds 1 second
shows just a total starting at 0, a button labeled "small +1" that adds 1, and a button labeled "large +100" that adds 100
has two text inputs (first name then last name) and shows them joined with a space
shows just a number starting at 3 and a button labeled "-" that subtracts 1 but stops at 0; when it reaches 0 the number is replaced by the text "none left"
